description.description: Policy description - explains what the policy checks and why it matters
examples: Checks if the system firewall is enabled to protect against unauthorized network access
Verifies full disk encryption is active on the device

query.description: SQL query that determines policy compliance. Required for standard policies; auto-generated when type: patch.
examples: SELECT 1 FROM system_info WHERE hostname LIKE '%-MBP-%';

type.description: Set to 'patch' to create a Fleet Maintained App patch policy. The SQL query is auto-generated.

fleet_maintained_app_slug.description: Fleet Maintained App slug for patch policies (e.g. zoom/darwin, firefox/windows)

version.description: Pin a specific app version for patch policies

platform.description: Target operating system - leave empty for all platforms

calendar_events_enabled.description: Enable calendar events for this policy

conditional_access_enabled.description: Enable conditional access for this policy

labels_include_any.description: Policy applies to hosts with any of these labels

labels_exclude_any.description: Exclude hosts with any of these labels

install_software.description: Software to install when policy fails (Premium feature, team-level only). Use true for patch policies, or an object for custom packages.

oneOf.description: Set to true to auto-install the patch policy's Fleet Maintained App when the policy fails
Install a specific software package when the policy fails (Premium feature, team-level only)

package_path.description: Path to a custom package YAML file

run_script.description: Script to run when policy fails (Premium feature, team-level only)
